description: MOLGENIS EMX2 data distribution at https://joeri.molgeniscloud.org for table Analyses in schema fdh, formatted as csv.
This distribution lists the metadata for the LOVD2-style JSON API of the A1BG gene in the public LOVD instance at https://databases.lovd.nl/shared/.
Coronavirus (COVID-19):\nSARS-CoV-2 in wastewater and positive persons tested for SARS-CoV-2 (csv)
